risk_title: Security Disruptions Affecting Data Quality Assurance
risk_summary: Data quality assurance activities are being delayed due to security situations, preventing completion of routine data quality assessment (RDQA) reports and limiting the MOH's ability to monitor and improve DHIS2 data quality.
evidence_quote: 2023 RDQA data collection was initiated but not yet finalized due to the security situation. Hence, the RDQA report has yet to be prepared.

risk_title: Conflict-Affected Areas Limiting Health Service Access
risk_summary: Health service delivery in conflict-affected areas remains constrained, with only 4 Mobile Health and Nutrition Teams (MHNT) established against a target of 20, and only 2 health facilities with physical maintenance completed against a target of 262, indicating slow progress in restoring services to conflict-affected populations.
evidence_quote: Mobile Health and Nutrition Team (MHNT) established in conflict affected areas (Number) (Number) Comments on achieving targets Number of Mobile health and Nutrition Team (MHNT) established to function for areas where facilities are not functional and/or accessibility poor, due to security reasons

risk_title: Limited Service Restoration in Conflict-Affected Regions
risk_summary: Only 2 health facilities have resumed all health services to pre-conflict status against a target of 262, indicating significant ongoing disruption to health service delivery in conflict-affected areas and slow recovery progress.
evidence_quote: Health facilities that resumed all health services to pre- conflict status (Number) (Number) Comments on achieving targets Number of Health facilities that resumed all health service to pre conflict status

risk_title: Conflict-Affected Population Health Service Coverage Stagnation
risk_summary: The number of women and children from conflict-affected populations receiving basic RMNCH services remains at baseline (1,562,173) with minimal progress toward the closing target of 2,387,912, indicating limited ability to expand services to conflict-affected populations.

risk_title: Persistent High Political and Macroeconomic Risk Rating
risk_summary: The overall risk rating remains High, with Political and Governance and Macroeconomic risks both rated High at approval and maintained at High in the current assessment, indicating sustained FCV-related vulnerabilities affecting project implementation.
